statement: For circuit class AC0, function clique requires size Ω(n^2).
informal_description: Template-synthesized conjecture connecting clique hardness to AC0 via williams_pipeline.
motivation: Template synthesis over known circuit classes/functions/techniques.
falsification_path: Search for small-n counterexamples or known-inclusion proofs.
implication_if_true: Progress on explicit lower bounds near P vs NP frontiers.
counterexample: n=2: found size-3 circuit below claimed Ω(4) bound
